processSteps.title: Free discovery call
processSteps.description: We learn about your business, your goals and your numbers — then give you a clear, no-obligation quote.

processSteps.title: Seamless onboarding
processSteps.description: We handle the switch from your old accountant, set up your cloud software and get everything in order.

processSteps.title: We manage the numbers
processSteps.description: Bookkeeping, tax, payroll and deadlines run quietly in the background while you focus on the business.

processSteps.title: You grow with insight
processSteps.description: Regular reviews and proactive advice keep you ahead — so every decision is backed by real data.

faqs.question: How much do your accountancy services cost?
faqs.answer: Every business is different, so we build a fixed monthly package around exactly what you need — accounts, tax, payroll, VAT and advice. You will always know the price before you commit, with no hidden hourly charges. Most limited company packages start from a clear, affordable monthly fee.

faqs.question: Is it difficult to switch from my current accountant?
faqs.answer: Not at all. We handle the entire move for you. With your permission we contact your previous accountant, request your records under standard professional clearance, and transfer everything across. The process is paperless and usually takes just a few days.

faqs.question: Which cloud accounting software do you use?
faqs.answer: We are partners with the leading platforms including Xero, QuickBooks, FreeAgent and Sage. We will recommend the best fit for your business, set it up, migrate your data and train you on the parts you want to use yourself.

faqs.question: Do you work with businesses outside London?
faqs.answer: Yes. We support clients right across the UK. Because everything runs in the cloud, you get the same proactive service whether you are around the corner or in another city — by video call, phone and email.

faqs.question: Will I have a dedicated accountant?
faqs.answer: Always. You are introduced to a named, qualified accountant who looks after your account year-round and gets to know your business. You will not be passed between a call centre or a different person each time you get in touch.

faqs.question: Are you regulated and insured?
faqs.answer: Yes. MMR Accountants is a chartered practice held to strict professional standards, and we carry full professional indemnity insurance for your complete peace of mind.
